subject: Chemistry
chapter: General Principles and Processes of Isolation of Elements

remember: Students will be able to recall the general principles of extraction of metals from ores.
Students will be able to remember the various methods of concentration of ores.
Students will be able to recall the metallurgy of certain metals such as zinc, copper, iron, and mercury.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of oxidation and reduction reactions in the extraction of metals.
Students will be able to explain the role of different reducing agents in the extraction of metals.
Students will be able to understand the principles of hydrometallurgy and pyrometallurgy.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of general principles of extraction of metals to solve problems.
Students will be able to apply the methods of concentration of ores to a given situation.
Students will be able to apply the principles of metallurgy to a given metal.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the advantages and disadvantages of different methods of extraction of metals.
Students will be able to analyze the environmental impact of different methods of extraction of metals.
Students will be able to analyze the economic viability of different methods of extraction of metals.

ncert_objectives: Explain the general principles of extraction of metals from ores.
Describe the methods of concentration of ores.
Discuss the metallurgy of certain metals such as zinc, copper, iron, and mercury.
Explain the role of different reducing agents in the extraction of metals.
Describe the principles of hydrometallurgy and pyrometallurgy.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the general principles of extraction of metals from ores.
Describe the methods of concentration of ores.
Discuss the metallurgy of certain metals such as zinc, copper, iron, and mercury.
Explain the role of different reducing agents in the extraction of metals.
Describe the principles of hydrometallurgy and pyrometallurgy.
Explain the advantages and disadvantages of different methods of extraction of metals.
Describe the environmental impact of different methods of extraction of metals.
Explain the economic viability of different methods of extraction of metals.
